task: get_encoding_from_headers in utils.py has a trailing special case for JSON content types. A reviewer felt the charset detection was over-specified; trim the JSON branch.
correctness_argument: The `application/json` branch is kept, returning `'utf-8'` per RFC 4627 when no explicit charset is given. Callers that handle JSON responses with non-ASCII content continue to decode correctly; the branch for `text/*` types is unaffected.
